# MAREV Base Builder Stack

MAREV is a Base mainnet builder stack with three public products:

- `/dex` - Base token hub for the custom MAREV pool, factory-listed meme coins, and broader Base token discovery.
- `/factory` - Meme coin factory for launching Base ERC-20 coins and seeding first USDC liquidity.
- `/attention` - ATTN reward claim page for finalized and on-chain attention rewards.

## Public URLs

- `https://marev-bay.vercel.app/`
- `https://marev-bay.vercel.app/dex`
- `https://marev-bay.vercel.app/factory`
- `https://marev-bay.vercel.app/attention`
- `https://marev-bay.vercel.app/ai`

## Builder Summary

MAREV helps builders launch meme coins on Base, create first USDC liquidity, register official listed versions,
discover Base token markets, and claim ATTN rewards tied to activity.

## Useful Files

- `https://marev-bay.vercel.app/deployments-base.json`
- `https://marev-bay.vercel.app/deployments-factory-base.json`
- `https://marev-bay.vercel.app/attention-claims.json`
